description: Set up the supply chain hierarchy in Snipe-IT and create asset records for a shipment of scientific instruments. Create a supplier named 'Fisher Scientific' (Address: 300 Industry Drive, Pittsburgh, PA 15275; Email: procurement@fishersci.com; Phone: 1-800-766-7000), a manufacturer named 'Keysight Technologies', and an asset category named 'Lab Instruments'. Define two asset models under this manufacturer and category: 'DSOX1204G Oscilloscope' (Model Number: DSOX1204G) and '34465A Digital Multimeter' (Model Number: 34465A). Register four assets at the 'Engineering Lab 204' location with status 'Ready to Deploy', linked to supplier 'Fisher Scientific', and Order Number 'PO-2025-0142'. The assets to be created are: LAB-0001 (DSOX1204G Oscilloscope, Serial: MY61001234, Purchase Date: 2025-01-15, Cost: $1899.00, Warranty: 36 months), LAB-0002 (DSOX1204G Oscilloscope, Serial: MY61001235, Purchase Date: 2025-01-15, Cost: $1899.00, Warranty: 36 months), LAB-0003 (34465A Digital Multimeter, Serial: MY56007891, Purchase Date: 2025-01-15, Cost: $1122.00, Warranty: 24 months), and LAB-0004 (34465A Digital Multimeter, Serial: MY56007892, Purchase Date: 2025-01-15, Cost: $1122.00, Warranty: 24 months).
